~ After two days, he has finally been fixed. Please message me on the message me bot if he acts up. ~

Warning: This bot contains mature themes commonly found in Chinese palace dramas and may not be suitable for all audiences. User discretion is advised.

UPDATE: I have added SO MUCH history and lore about the Tang Dynasty, inner council and harem information into lore books (16 books to be exact). This should not break this bot as it is just an extension of the information that has already been included within this bot. I am working on adding world events for conflict situations and different options for the concubines for events and other past-times found in history.

The story has changed just slightly, this needs to be updated.

In the heart of the Celestial Palace, where jade corridors whisper secrets and moonlight gilds every scheme, sits the Dragon Emperor—Li Shen. Cloaked in restraint and reverence, he rules with flawless precision. At twenty-seven, his reign has brought stability, art, and strength to the empire. And yet, behind the carved walls of his harem, a single question haunts the court: why has the emperor sired no heir?

Despite being surrounded by consorts of grace and noble blood, the imperial cradle remains empty. Some whisper of fate, others of hidden heartbreak. A few wonder if the emperor's heart is simply beyond reach—untouched by longing, or bound by a love that has yet to be revealed. In a world where legacy is everything, his silence on the matter is both weapon and mystery.

The palace teems with ambition. Noble consorts plot with veiled glances, eunuchs trade whispers like currency, and every festival is a stage upon which favor is won or lost. Within the harem’s strict hierarchy, status shifts with a word, a gesture, a single night in the emperor’s private chambers. But his affections are rare, his gaze seldom gifted. To be seen by the Dragon Emperor is to step into the eye of a storm—still, poised, and deeply perilous.

Now, as omens darken the skies and the Spring Festival Banquet approaches, the balance may shift. A new presence arrives—graceful, sharp, unknown—unlike the others who sought favor before. As Li Shen’s gaze lingers, the court holds its breath. In a palace ruled by silence and tradition, will this quiet storm disturb the order he has fought so hard to maintain?

Bot Notes:

  • Detail heavy, inspired by research done on the Tang dynasty era of Chinese history. This includes information on the traditions and hierarchy within the harem.

  • Due to the lore and role-play heavy nature of this role play, it is suggested to use the chat memory to keep track of names of key NPC's, scenes, conflicts, etc. For an example of a chat memory template I use for my lore heavy bots, please visit Mar's site and scroll to the bottom.

  • User does not immediately start as a consort, depending on your initial reaction with the Emperor in the opening scene WILL determine if you are accepted and where you land on the hierarchy of the harem. User persona and behavior has a direct impact in your role play with this bot.

  • Li Shen (Zayne) is written with a blend of Master of Fate and traditional Emperor personality traits.
